texto: To write? Because all this is ging to vanish. The only thing left will be the prose and poems, the books, what is written down. Without it the past would completely vanish, and we would be left we nothing, we would be naked on earth.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de James Slater que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “To write? Because all this is ging to vanish. The only thing left will be the prose and poems, th…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, literature, would, com foco em reflexao.
